title: Reorder multiple subitsn at once

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello to all,

I usually work with lists of our clients under the same Main Element as subelements and from time to time i need to do some reorder on them due to various reasons…

I’ve noticed that I can only reorder one by one instead selecting a bunch and moving up or down at once.

Can this feature be doable?
